basic_details.job_title: ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 BPM, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur (ZSS Jajpur) has released the official BPM, Medical Officer and More Notification 2026 on 26 May 2026 at the official website http://jajpur.odisha.gov.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced under the ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications as mentioned in the official notification can apply offline until 09 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form link are available below.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details.

salary_details.details: Block Program Manager (BPM): As per Society Norm Case Registry Assistant (CRA): As per Society Norm Pediatrician, DEIC: Rs.1,06,379/-+ PI Medical Officer, DEIC:Rs.85,103/-+ PI Medical Officer, SNCU: Rs.85,103/-+ PI Medical Officer (Ayush, Collocated): As per Society Norm Medical Officer (RBSK): As per Society Norm Senior TB Lab. Supervisor (NTEP): As per Society Norm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ZSS Jajpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://jajpur.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form is 09 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Block Program Manager (BPM) post?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is 1 vacancy for the Block Program Manager (BPM) post. However, the total number of vacancies released by ZSS Jajpur is 13 for various posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur, which is http://jajpur.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Block Program Manager (BPM) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Block Program Manager (BPM) post will be as per the Society Norms. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations provided?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for information on age relaxation.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the completed application form will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates should carefully check the notification for the correct mailing address.

faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form is 09 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
